nodes.name: provision_remote_admin_test_user.sql
nodes.summary: SQL snippet for provisioning an admin test user in a remote Supabase project, inserting auth.users and profiles records for integration testing.

nodes.name: railway-cron-poc-drift.json
nodes.summary: Test fixture containing a Railway GraphQL API response representing a drifted cron configuration state, used to validate drift detection logic.

nodes.name: railway-cron-poc-live.json
nodes.summary: Test fixture containing a Railway GraphQL API response representing live cron configuration state with all services matching expected config.

nodes.name: cron-runner-boundary.test.mjs
nodes.summary: Guard test verifying that all cron runner shell scripts have consistent structure and reference the correct edge function names.

nodes.name: db-types-script.test.mjs
nodes.summary: Guard test verifying that the database type generation script in package.json targets the correct Supabase DB port and matches the CI workflow configuration.

nodes.name: deploy-cli-boundary.test.mjs
nodes.summary: Guard test importing and exercising the railway-cron-drift script's exported functions to validate cron state parsing and drift detection boundary conditions.

nodes.name: migration-rollbacks.test.mjs
nodes.summary: Guard test validating that all Supabase migration files have corresponding rollback files and that timestamps follow the expected naming convention.

nodes.name: supabase-function-auth-config.test.mjs
nodes.summary: Guard test parsing supabase/config.toml to assert that every edge function has an explicit verify_jwt auth setting, preventing accidental open endpoints.
